author: builder
summary: Replaced in-memory Maps in coordination.ts with DatabaseAdapter-backed persistence using Postgres schemas. Coordination state now survives process restart.

files_changed.description: Postgres schema definitions for coordination_claim, coordination_reservation, and coordination_fan_out tables
Replaced in-memory Maps with DatabaseAdapter-backed persistence; added row-to-type converter functions; rewrote CoordinationTool to capture adapter at init time

coordination_claim.description: Tracks wave-level subagent task claims. task_id is the natural key (session ID). Re-claiming via ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE resets status to claimed.

coordination_reservation.description: Path reservation for concurrent file conflict prevention. path is the natural key (one active reservation per path at a time).

coordination_fan_out.description: Fan-out group tracking for wave-based subagent task groups. task_ids stored as JSONB array. complete_count incremented atomically via SQL expression on release/fail.

schema_design.design_rationale: Drizzle ORM pgTable definitions compatible with both Postgres and SQLite via DrizzleLikeClient abstraction. Raw SQL expressions (sql`...`) used for atomic increment of complete_count. ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for re-claiming tasks and re-reserving paths.

implementation_details.persistence_pattern: yield* DatabaseAdapter.Service to obtain adapter, then adapter.query/adapter.transaction for database operations
implementation_details.atomicity: claimTask, releaseTask, failTask, reservePath use adapter.transaction for atomic multi-table operations
implementation_details.api_preserved: All 11 exported functions keep same signatures: claimTask, releaseTask, failTask, getClaim, getSessionClaims, getWaveClaims, reservePath, releasePath, checkPathReserved, getFanOutGroup, formatStructuredResult
implementation_details.coordination_tool_cache: DatabaseAdapter.Service captured at tool init time in outer Effect.gen, used in execute closure to avoid requirement propagation into Tool.define's expected never-R execute signature
implementation_details.row_converters: claimRowToType, reservationRowToType, fanOutRowToType convert snake_case DB rows to camelCase TypeScript types

acceptance_criteria.state_survives_restart: Yes — all state persisted in database via DatabaseAdapter-backed tables
acceptance_criteria.leases_recoverable: Yes — claim table stores all active/released/failed claims with session_id, task_id, wave context
acceptance_criteria.artifact_claims_recoverable: Yes — claim table contains subagent_type, description, result, error fields
acceptance_criteria.handoff_state_recoverable: Yes — fan-out group table tracks wave completion across subagent tasks
acceptance_criteria.typecheck_passes: LSP shows 1 pre-existing Schema.Literal error (same as send-message.ts, rig-git.ts — Effect v4 beta type issue not caused by this change)
acceptance_criteria.coordination_tests_pass: No coordination-specific tests exist yet; existing callers (task.ts, edit.ts, write.ts) unchanged and continue to use yield* Coordination.xxx(...)

pre_existing_dirty_files_source.note: coordination.ts was already untracked (new file from parallel workstream). Schema file also untracked (new file). No merge conflicts with parallel lanes since coordination.ts was entirely new.

blast_radius.impact: All callers use yield* Coordination.xxx(...) which now requires DatabaseAdapter.Service in Effect context — already provided by AppLayer (line 119, app-runtime.ts)
blast_radius.schema_new_file: packages/opencode/src/coordination/coordination.pg.sql.ts — automatically picked up by drizzle.config.pg.ts glob pattern ./src/**/*.pg.sql.ts
